title: Resident Evil: Afterlife
subTitle: Alice learns of a mysterious haven named Arcadia while fighting the Umbrella Corporation. She decides to join a group of survivors headed to Arcadia, unaware that they are walking into a trap.

title: Food Factory
subTitle: Curious minds explore how food items like chequerboard cookies, honey and wheat bread are manufactured from raw materials.

title: Man vs. Wild
subTitle: Bear travels to America's greatest mountain range-the Sierra Nevada. He uses his knowledge of American Indian survival techniques to build shelters, calm wild horses, and find food.

title: Man vs. Wild
subTitle: In the icy weather of Patagonia, the survival expert reveals the hidden dangers that make survival so difficult and demonstrates how to build a snow cave.

title: Man vs. Wild
subTitle: Bear travels to America's greatest mountain range-the Sierra Nevada. He uses his knowledge of American Indian survival techniques to build shelters, calm wild horses, and find food.

title: Man vs. Wild
subTitle: In the lethal jungle of Panama, Bear Grylls tackles some extreme survival challenges and some grisly eats to show you how to get out alive.

title: Man vs. Wild
subTitle: Bear Grylls has served with the British Special forces, climbed to the peak of Everest and explored the frozen ocean of the Arctic. Now he faces the punishing heat of the Moab desert in Utah.

title: Forbidden: Dying for Love
subTitle: When Montreal teen Zainab Shafia meets Ammar Wahid, it is love at first sight. But their relationship is forbidden by her strict father.

title: A Nightmare on Elm Street
subTitle: After Kris and her boyfriend Dean die due to a mysterious dream, Nancy, their friend, who has been having similar dreams realises that the killer finds his victims when they fall asleep.

title: Resident Evil: Apocalypse
subTitle: Alice wakes up to find that Raccoon city is infested with zombies and monsters. Later, she tries her best to find a way out of the city before it is too late.

title: Dolphin Tale 2
subTitle: Sawyer and Dr Clay Haskett embark on an ambitious mission to find a companion for Winter, a rescued bottlenose dolphin, after its sole companion and surrogate mother, Panama, dies.

title: The Amazing Spider-Man
subTitle: After a genetically altered spider bites him, Peter Parker develops superhuman abilities and confronts a humanoid reptilian creature.

subTitle: Alice learns of a mysterious haven named Arcadia while fighting the Umbrella Corporation. She decides to join a group of survivors headed to Arcadia, unaware that they are walking into a trap.

title: Goosebumps 2: Haunted Halloween
subTitle: Sonny and Sam find an ancient manuscript in an abandoned house while cleaning it. However, things escalate when the text brings a ventriloquist dummy named Slappy to life.

title: Ninja Assassin
subTitle: A lethal assassin named Raizo embarks on a violent quest for vengeance against his former clan, who are responsible for the murder of a woman he once loved.

title: Man vs. Wild
subTitle: Mountaineers survive in the Alps in potentially fatal conditions.

title: Man vs. Wild
subTitle: Bear will have to skin and disembowel a camel in an attempt to stay alive as he wonders if he will learn to deal with the hardships and the disgusting taste of the camel.

title: Man vs. Wild
subTitle: Bear Grylls shows how to survive the big island of Hawaii, home to Kilauea, the world's most active volcano and one of the toughest places on Earth.

title: Man vs. Wild
subTitle: In Patagonia, Bear skins a hare, scales a cliff, tracks a puma, drinks dirty water and crosses the Perito Moreno Glacier, a labyrinth of ice caves and crevasses.

subTitle: Lincoln Six-Echo, a resident of an isolated facility, desperately wants to go to The Island, the last safe haven on Earth. However, he soon discovers that everything he knows is a lie.

subTitle: Adventurer Bear Grylls survives the Pacific Ocean, encountering coral reefs, rip currents, and relentless surf and comes face to face with sharks.

subTitle: On his next expedition to nature's kitchen, Bear Grylls resorts to drinking liquid from a camel's stomach while devouring whatever wild food he can put in his mouth.

subTitle: A snake hunter offers his assistance to a documentary crew attempting to film an indigenous tribe in the Amazon. But as the journey progresses, his presence forces them to veer into dangerous waters.

subTitle: While Neo, humanity's only hope of saving Zion, attempts to broker peace between the machines and humans, he must also deal with his arch-nemesis, Agent Smith.

subTitle: As Robert McCall finds himself forming a new bond with the locals of an Italian town, the region's oppression by the Mafia triggers him to protect his people.

subTitle: A team of researchers is in Borneo to find the blood orchid, a flower that could hold the secret to eternal life. However, the scientists run afoul of the jungle's deadly snakes.
